title: Measurement of leaf surface area
author: Muzzini, Valerio Giorgio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Leaf surface area is an important measurement in several plant-related research fields. The measurement includes some steps, such as sampling, image acquisition, their analysis and presentation of the results. These steps, in general, are essential for the research activity, therefore the description of the key steps of the scientific method helps students to understand the surrounding world and develop a critical spirit. In this document the individual steps indicated above will be briefly described, thus providing a possible guide for teachers and students.
